[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A close-up, selfie-style photo shows a young person facing the camera with a playful open-mouth expression.

Main Subject: The main subject is a young person photographed from close range, filling most of the frame. Their head and shoulders are centered, with their face close to the camera and their lips pursed in a “blowing a kiss” or puckered expression, mouth open and lips colored with a reddish tone. Their light-colored eyes are visible and they look directly toward the camera.

Setting: The background appears to be indoors, likely a bathroom or similar room. Behind the subject is a light-colored tiled wall and a horizontal ledge or panel. On the left side of the background, a dark cord or strap runs diagonally upward, and a small gold-colored fixture or knob is partially visible.

Visual Details: The lighting is soft and even, with minimal shadows, suggesting indoor ambient light. The person has straight, light brown or dark blonde hair parted near the top and falling around the sides of the face; a dark hair clip or clasp is visible on the right side of the head. They wear a light-colored, fuzzy or textured top or outer layer around the collar area. The composition is tightly cropped, with the camera angle slightly above or level with the face, emphasizing the mouth and eyes.

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image shows a close-up of a young person making a puckered, playful face while looking at the camera. The background shows an indoor tiled wall and a few partially visible items near the top corners of the frame.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No visible text in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- None

# Notes

- The image appears to contain a photo with no readable or visible text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
